revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] [[Category:refreshing imports]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] [[Category:qq]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23631271398|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{template shortcut|transcluding|transcludingarticle}} {{Lua|Module:Labelled list hatnote}} This is a [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|hatnote]] that functions similarly to {{tl|main article}}, but is used to indicate that an article on which this template is placed [[WP:Transclusion|transcludes]] other articles, and what articles those are. Example: a railway route map template for a particular railway article. Another example: A list of TV show episodes built by transcluding all of its season articles. Surround it with the [[WP:NOINCLUDE|<noinclude>...</noinclude>]] markup when applying this template inside another template. Aliases of this template are {{tl|Transcluding}} and {{tl|Transcluding articles}}. === Usage === {{transcluding article |Article 1 }} You may also include additional links: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 }} For each link, you may optionally specify a link appearance (this is for articles where a piped link would be used). Note that the extra parameters use a lower case 'L', e.g. l1 not 11: {{transcluding articles |Article 1 |Article 2 |Article 3 |Article 4 |Article 5 |Article 6 |Article 7 |Article 8 |Article 9 |Article 10 |l1=Article 1 link appearance |l2=Article 2 link appearance |l3=Article 3 link appearance |l4=Article 4 link appearance |l5=Article 5 link appearance |l6=Article 6 link appearance |l7=Article 7 link appearance |l8=Article 8 link appearance |l9=Article 9 link appearance |l10=Article 10 link appearance }} === See also === * {{tl|Transcluded section}} for when only a section has been transcluded. * {{tl|Excerpt}} – transcludes a lead section or a section with many options and adds an appropriate hatnote * {{tl|Main article}} * {{tl|See also}} {{hatnote templates}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Hatnote templates for lists]] [[Category:Hatnote templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia page-section templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
